problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Combining Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
